pr.title: Add Cursor Cloud development environment instructions
pr.body: Adds a `## Cursor Cloud specific instructions` section to `AGENTS.md` documenting the development environment setup for cloud agents. ### What's included - Service table (SvelteKit dev server + Convex backend) - Quick reference for common commands (lint, check, build, format) - Key gotchas (Convex URL import behavior, pnpm-lock cleanup, .env setup, coding style rules) ### Demo [demo_site_navigation.mp4](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-7c662ed4-b1b0-42c2-96b3-2bbf759caf37/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fdemo_site_navigation.mp4) The dev server starts successfully and all static content (homepage, blog posts, projects) renders correctly. [Homepage](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-7c662ed4-b1b0-42c2-96b3-2bbf759caf37/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fhomepage.webp) [Blog listing](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-7c662ed4-b1b0-42c2-96b3-2bbf759caf37/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fblog_listing.webp) [Projects page](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-7c662ed4-b1b0-42c2-96b3-2bbf759caf37/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fprojects_page.webp) To show artifacts inline, enable in settings.
pr.author: injoon5
